task_completion.description: Initialize a new IFC4 project in Bonsai (BlenderBIM)
task_completion.visual_evidence: Blender interface is open with the Bonsai/BlenderBIM add-on active. The Scene Properties or Project setup panel should indicate a new IFC4 project has been created.
The Blender Outliner or Bonsai structural/spatial tree shows an entity named or typed as 'IfcStructuralAnalysisModel'.

task_completion.description: Create at least two IfcStructuralPointConnection entities for foundational support nodes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows at least two distinct node objects (often represented as empties or vertices), and the Outliner/Object Properties confirm their IFC class is 'IfcStructuralPointConnection'.

task_completion.description: Create at least one IfcStructuralCurveMember entity connecting the nodes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D viewport shows a line/edge connecting the two point connection nodes, and the Outliner/Object Properties confirm its IFC class is 'IfcStructuralCurveMember'.

task_completion.description: Save the project as an IFC file to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file save dialog or the Blender window title bar shows the file being saved as 'analytical_frame.ifc' in the '/home/ga/BIMProjects/' directory, or a terminal window shows verification of the file at this exact path.

integrity.description: Agent used the Bonsai (BlenderBIM) GUI to create the model
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with Blender's 3D viewport, Outliner, and Bonsai tool panels rather than just running a Python script in the terminal to generate the IFC file.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual 3D modeling application
integrity.visual_evidence: The Blender interface is clearly visible with standard menus, toolbars, and 3D grid, rather than a text editor manually writing IFC STEP physical file format lines.

integrity.description: Agent built the model from a blank project rather than loading a completed file
integrity.visual_evidence: Early screenshots show an empty 3D viewport and the process of adding the structural entities one by one.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/BIMProjects/analytical_frame.ifc'. The structural model must contain at least one 'IfcStructuralAnalysisModel', at least two 'IfcStructuralPointConnection' entities, and at least one 'IfcStructuralCurveMember'. The task requires using the Bonsai (BlenderBIM) UI.
